name: ULTRALIFE CORP
summary: Ultralife Corporation designs and manufactures power solutions and communications systems for government, defense, and commercial customers worldwide. Products include non-rechargeable Lithium Manganese Dioxide and Lithium Thionyl Chloride batteries, rechargeable Lithium-ion and NiMH batteries, charging systems, RF amplifiers, vehicle amplifier-adaptors, man-portable systems, and integrated communications electronics. The company sells through OEMs, defense distributors, and directly to U.S. and foreign defense departments, with operations in North America, Europe, and Asia.

products.name: Lithium 9-volt Battery
products.description: Non-rechargeable Li-MnO2 battery used in smoke alarms, wireless security systems, and intensive care monitors.

products.name: Ultralife HiRate Cylindrical Battery
products.description: Non-rechargeable lithium battery sold to military and OEMs for radios, night vision, targeting, and thermal imaging devices.

products.name: Ultralife Thin Cell Battery
products.description: Non-rechargeable lithium thin cell battery for industrial, medical, and military specialty applications.

products.name: Lithium Thionyl Chloride Battery
products.description: Sold under Electrochem and Ultralife brands for utility meters, automotive electronics, and downhole drilling devices.

products.name: Rechargeable Lithium-ion Battery
products.description: Custom-sized rechargeable batteries for communications, medical, and portable electronic device applications.

products.name: NiMH Rechargeable Battery
products.description: Nickel Metal Hydride rechargeable batteries for various portable electronic applications.

products.name: Charging Systems
products.description: Battery charging systems sold as part of the Battery & Energy Products segment.

products.name: Uninterruptable Power Supplies
products.description: UPS units included within the Battery & Energy Products segment offerings.

products.name: RF Amplifiers
products.description: Military communications RF amplifiers designed for rugged field environments.

products.name: Vehicle Amplifier-Adaptor (VAA)
products.description: Vehicle-mounted communications systems supporting U.S. Army and Special Operations programs.

products.name: Man-Portable Communications Systems
products.description: Integrated portable communications systems for military field use.

products.name: Integrated Communications Systems
products.description: Fixed and vehicle-application communications and electronics systems for military and commercial use.

products.name: Rugged IT Case Systems
products.description: Commercial products integrating IT equipment and power conversion into rugged cases for automotive, cellular, and manufacturing industries.

partnerships.partner_name: Ultralife Batteries India Private Limited (India JV)
partnerships.description: 51%-owned joint venture with Indian distributor partner for assembling Ultralife products and managing local sales throughout India.
